name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning update from {{orgName}}
args.body:
Good morning {{firstName}},

Just a gentle check-in before the chairs fill up. Yesterday brought a few new faces to the practice and some appointments moving along nicely — nothing that needs chasing, just wanted you to have the picture.

We'll keep things calm and steady on our end. Have a warm one today.

— Bright Smile Dental
